pr.title: Add objdiff option tip to README
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Documentation-only PR adding a README tip for objdiff users: enable the `Relax relocation diffs` setting under `Diff Options`. The change also adds a supporting screenshot asset, `.github/assets/relax.png`. This matters because relocation noise can distract from meaningful codegen differences during decomp matching.
what_changed: Inserted a GitHub Markdown `[!TIP]` callout in `.github/README.md` after the objdiff screenshot section.
The tip recommends enabling `Relax relocation diffs` under objdiff `Diff Options`.
Added a new binary screenshot asset, `.github/assets/relax.png`, referenced by the README.
smart_moves: Placed the tip directly next to the existing objdiff usage instructions, where new contributors are most likely to see it.
Used the exact objdiff UI label, `Relax relocation diffs`, making the guidance actionable rather than vague.
Included a screenshot to reduce ambiguity about where the option is located.
decomp_lessons: When using objdiff for Melee decomp work, enable `Relax relocation diffs` to reduce relocation-related diff noise.
README/tooling guidance can encode small workflow defaults that help contributors focus on meaningful matching differences.
For onboarding docs, pair exact UI option names with screenshots when the setting is important to the matching workflow.
naming_conventions: The objdiff option is documented with its exact UI capitalization: `Relax relocation diffs`.
The containing menu/section is documented as `Diff Options`.
The new screenshot asset uses a short lowercase descriptive filename: `relax.png`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use objdiff's `Relax relocation diffs` option to avoid over-emphasizing relocation differences while comparing generated object code.
No assembly changes or symbol-level matching tactics were present in this PR beyond the objdiff configuration recommendation.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review bodies were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Where else does the project document recommended objdiff settings?
Are there other objdiff options that should be standardized for contributors?
Do contributor onboarding docs consistently mention `Relax relocation diffs`?
